name: 🧠 Fusion Logic
→ ThingsBoard format

CREATE TABLE
func:
msg.topic = "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS historique (" +
    "id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, " +
    "ts TEXT, " +
    "niveau INTEGER, " +
    "etat TEXT, " +
    "buzzer INTEGER, " +
    "perclos REAL, " +
    "tilt REAL)";
return msg;
